operational_knowledge_units.title: Zone Config Aveva API page shows lane assignments, zones, and processing sequence numbers
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The Zone Config interface is described as providing an overview of lane assignments, their respective zones, and processing sequence numbers.
observed_evidence: Slide title: 'Zone Config / Aveva API page'
Visible text: 'This interface provides an overview of lane assignments, their respective zones, and the processing sequence numbers.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Zone Config Aveva API page UI concept. Interface provides an overview of lane assignments, their respective zones, and processing sequence numbers.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Get Zone Configuration fetches current lane configuration
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The Get Zone Configuration capability fetches the current configuration of all lanes to provide visibility into how each lane is set up within the system.
observed_evidence: Visible text: 'Fetches the current configuration of all lanes, offering visibility into how each lane is set up within the system.'

relationships.target: how each lane is set up within the system

operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Aveva Zone Config API capability: Get Zone Configuration fetches the current configuration of all lanes and provides visibility into lane setup within the system.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Update Zone Configuration modifies zone settings
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The Update Zone Configuration capability allows users to modify zone settings so operations can adapt to system needs or changing requirements.
observed_evidence: Visible text: 'Allows users to modify zone settings, ensuring flexibility to adapt operations based on system needs or changing requirements.'

relationships.target: adapting operations based on system needs or changing requirements

operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Aveva Zone Config API capability: Update Zone Configuration allows users to modify zone settings for operational flexibility based on system needs or changing requirements.
